cmd:
bash -c 
INC=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/libhipcxx/src/include
TINC=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/libhipcxx/src/.upstream-tests/test/support
TROOT=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/libhipcxx/src/.upstream-tests/test
TDIR="$TROOT/std/thread/thread.semaphore"
FI="$TROOT/force_include_hip.h"
export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
pass=0; fail=0; hang=0

run_test() {
  local t="$1" wd="${2:-0}"
  echo "--- $t ---"
  if [ "$wd" -gt 0 ]; then
    timeout "$wd" "$t"; local rc=$?
    [ "$rc" -eq 124 ] && { echo "HANG (watchdog ${wd}s)"; ((hang++)); return; }
    [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && { echo "FAIL (rc=$rc)"; ((fail++)); return; }
  else
    "$t" || { echo "FAIL"; ((fail++)); return; }
  fi
  echo "PASS"
  ((pass++))
}

# sem_test (device semaphore)
hipcc -std=c++17 --offload-arch=gfx1100 -I "$INC" /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/libhipcxx/validation/sem_test.cpp -o "$WORK/sem_test" 2>/dev/null
run_test "$WORK/sem_test"

# umbrella smoke (fixed version)
hipcc -std=c++17 --offload-arch=gfx1100 -I "$INC" /tmp/test_smoke2.cpp -o "$WORK/sem_umbrella" 2>/dev/null
run_test "$WORK/sem_umbrella"

# block probe (fixed version, wave32 hazard question)
hipcc -std=c++17 --offload-arch=gfx1100 -I "$INC" /tmp/test_block_probe.cpp -o "$WORK/sem_block" 2>/dev/null
run_test "$WORK/sem_block" 30

# conformance suite
for t in version max try_acquire acquire release; do
  hipcc -std=c++17 --offload-arch=gfx1100 -I "$INC" -I "$TINC" -I "$TROOT" --include "$FI" "$TDIR/$t.pass.cpp" -o "$WORK/conf_$t" 2>/dev/null
  run_test "$WORK/conf_$t"
done

# timed (known fail due to TSC)
hipcc -std=c++17 --offload-arch=gfx1100 -I "$INC" -I "$TINC" -I "$TROOT" --include "$FI" "$TDIR/timed.pass.cpp" -o "$WORK/conf_timed" 2>/dev/null
echo "--- timed (known fail: TSC clock) ---"
timeout 30 "$WORK/conf_timed" 2>&1 | tail -5; rc=$?
[ $rc -eq 124 ] && { echo "HANG"; ((hang++)); } || { echo "FAIL (rc=$rc, expected: TSC timing error)"; ((fail++)); }

# heterogeneous
hipcc -std=c++17 --offload-arch=gfx1100 -I "$INC" -I "$TINC" -I "$TROOT" --include "$FI" "$TROOT/heterogeneous/semaphore.pass.cpp" -o "$WORK/conf_het" 2>/dev/null
run_test "$WORK/conf_het"

rm -rf "$WORK"
echo ""
echo "=== RESULTS: $pass PASS / $fail FAIL / $hang HANG ==="
echo "(timed.pass.cpp fails on gfx1100 due to TSC clock accuracy, same as gfx90a but different symptom)"
